title: MS-15 diamond boron missile

{{Quote|Thing was one of the Empire's new diamond-boron-armored jobs. Nothing he had to throw at it could have stopped it.|[[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles]] on [[Dash Rendar/Legends|Dash Rendar]]|<ref name="SOTE" />}}
The '''MS-15 diamond boron missile''' was an anti-[[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] missile system manufactured by [[Sienar Fleet Systems/Legends|Sienar Fleet Systems]] at the height of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. It was primarily used by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]].

==Description==
{{Quote|Blast! I've got to be hitting it! Why doesn't it stop?|[[Dash Rendar/Legends|Dash Rendar]]|<ref name="SOTE" />}}
Manufactured by [[Sienar Fleet Systems/Legends|Sienar fleet Systems]], the MS-15 comprised a sleek, one-[[Meter/Legends|meter]]-long [[Warhead/Legends|warhead]] that could be fired from any [[Concussion missile launcher/Legends|concussion missile launcher]]. The [[Warhead/Legends|warhead]] featured extendable dorsal and ventral flanges for additional protection and atmospheric maneuverability, and its [[Armor/Legends|armored]] [[Diamond/Legends|diamond]] [[Boron/Legends|boron]] blast plates extended in proximity to the target, making the [[Missile/Legends|missile]] almost impervious to [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] [[Laser cannon/Legends|laser cannons]]. The MS-15 could out-pace even the [[Proton torpedo/Legends|proton torpedo]], and had a flight time of up to ten [[Standard minute/Legends|minutes]].<ref name="EGWT" />

These missiles could be programmed to follow set coordinates, or otherwise primed to explode when the internal [[Sensor/Legends|sensor]] suite registered a specific number of enemy vessels, with the common amount being three. [[Gunner/Legends|Gunners]] could also guide the missiles remotely, though this method ran the risk of interception by enemy [[Jammer/Legends|jamming devices]]. The fifty-meter blast radius could also pose a problem if friendly vessels were in range upon detonation.<ref name="EGWT" />

==History==
The Galactic Empire began to use diamond boron missiles around the time of the [[Battle of Hoth/Legends|Battle of Hoth]]. The [[Freighter/Legends|freighter]] ''[[Suprosa]]'', carrying the readouts of the [[Death Star II/Legends|second Death Star]], was armed with MS-15 missiles, and deployed one after [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] launched a raid on the vessel. [[Dash Rendar/Legends|Dash Rendar]] was unable to destroy the missile before it detonated in the middle of [[Blue Squadron (Bothan)|Blue Squadron's]] fighter formation, obliterating four [[BTL Y-wing starfighter/Legends|Y-wings]] and all eight [[Bothan/Legends|Bothan]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilots]]. It was only following Rendar's supposed [[Death/Legends|death]] over [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] that the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance]] learned that the warhead had been a diamond boron missile, and that Dash's inability to destroy it was no fault of his own.<ref name="EGWT" />

Sienar Fleet Systems continued to produce [[diamond boron missile]]s although they never gained wide acceptance—in part due to their hefty price tag of nearly twenty thousand [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]]. a piece Incidents in which faulty warheads exploded while in storage also contributed to their lack of popularity. Nevertheless, diamond boron missiles were produced in limited numbers while Sienar tried to develop new, cost-effective designs.<ref name="EGWT" />
